name: Widowhail
explicitMods: 250% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Quiver
flavourText: "I loosed a volley of arrows into the heart of the man
who slew my beloved. There was no satisfaction, no
healing, no revenge. There was only... emptiness."
- Chieftainess Ahuana of the Ramako Tribe

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills, making them repeat when cast. Cannot support Vaal skills, totem skills, channelling skills, triggered skills, instant skills, retaliation skills, blink skills, or skills with a reservation.
explicitMods: Supported Skills Repeat an additional time
Supported Skills have 54% more Cast Speed
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Teleport to a location, damaging enemies in an area at both ends of the teleport. Deals higher damage to chilled enemies, then removes chill from them. Cannot be supported by Unleash.
socketedItems.builtInSupport: Supported by Level 1 Increased Critical Strikes
explicitMods: This Spell's Cast Time is added to its Cooldown if Triggered
19% more Damage with Hits per 5% Chill Effect on Enemy
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: While this skill is active, supported spells will be repeatedly triggered.
explicitMods: Each Supported Spell will Trigger when its Cooldown is over
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

explicitMods: Supported Spells are Triggered when their Cooldowns are over
hybrid.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that are instant and have no reservation. Cannot support Vaal skills or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Spends a portion of your mana to grant a buff that takes some of the damage from hits for you until depleted. The buff grants added lightning damage based on the amount of mana spent by this skill. Shares a cooldown with other Guard skills.
explicitMods:
75% of Damage from Hits is taken from Buff before your Life or Energy Shield
Buff can take Damage equal to Mana Spent by this Skill's effect
Buff grants Added Lightning Damage equal to 14% of Mana Spent by this Skill's effect
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports spell skills that deal damage with hits and have no reservation. Cannot support arcane skills, Brand skills, Orb skills, Vaal skills, or skills used by totems, traps or mines. Cannot modify the skills of minions.
explicitMods: Supported Skills gain Added Lightning Damage equal to 16% of Unreserved Maximum Mana
Supported Skills gain Base Mana Cost equal to 5% of Unreserved Maximum Mana
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Spell Damage
socketedItems.descrText: This is a Support Gem. It does not grant a bonus to your character, but to skills in sockets connected to it. Place into an item socket connected to a socket containing the Skill Gem you wish to augment. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Supports projectile spells you cast yourself. Cannot support triggered skills, Vaal skills, instant skills, channelling skills, skills with a reservation or which create minions, or skills used by totems, traps, or mines.
explicitMods:
Supported Spells gain Intensity when you Cast them, to a maximum of 3
Supported Skills fire 1 fewer Projectile per Intensity
Supported Spells lose 1 Intensity every 0.5 seconds while moving, or immediately if you teleport
Projectiles from Supported Skills deal 20% more Damage with Hits per Intensity
Supported Skills always fire at least 1 Projectile
Supported Skills deal 10% increased Projectile Damage
Supported Skills deal 9% less Projectile Damage

name: Foulborn Kikazaru
explicitMods: 72% reduced Effect of Curses on you

name: Anathema
explicitMods: 10% chance to gain a Power Charge when you Cast a Curse Spell
Your Curse Limit is equal to your maximum Power Charges
flavourText: Enraged by the incompetence of mortals
Unleashing a litany of pain upon the world.

name: Atziri's Foible
explicitMods: Items and Gems have 25% reduced Attribute Requirements
flavourText: The world is but a piece of parchment, blank and symmetric.
We label each side: one Good, one Evil; one Black, one White.
The divine truth, however, is that both are one and the same.

typeLine: Seething Divine Life Flask of the Dielectric
explicitMods: Grants Immunity to Shock for 17 seconds if used while Shocked
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

typeLine: Seething Divine Life Flask of Allaying
explicitMods:
Grants Immunity to Bleeding for 12 seconds if used while Bleeding
Grants Immunity to Corrupted Blood for 12 seconds if used while affected by Corrupted Blood
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

typeLine: Seething Eternal Mana Flask of Convection
explicitMods:
Grants Immunity to Chill for 6 seconds if used while Chilled
Grants Immunity to Freeze for 6 seconds if used while Frozen
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

name: Victory League
craftedMods: 11% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill

socketedItems.secDescrText: Places a Sigil on the ground, which grants a buff to you and allies in the area around it for a duration. The Sigil gains stages as you spend mana in its area, making the buff more powerful. You can only have one Sigil of Power at a time.
explicitMods: Gains a Stage when you Spend a total of 400 Mana while in Area
Enemies in Area deal 23% less Damage while at maximum Stages
Buff grants 7 to 141 Added Lightning Damage per Stage
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Creates a magical brand which can attach to a nearby enemy. It periodically activates while attached, triggering linked spells. The brand will detach if the enemy dies.
explicitMods: Increases and Reductions to Cast Speed also apply to this Skill's Activation frequency
Can be Attached for a total Duration of 3.00 seconds
Can be Detached for a total Duration of 5.00 seconds

socketedItems.secDescrText: Place a Frost Shield that drains your energy shield for one second or until you run out, gaining stages while this drain occurs. The Frost Shield takes some damage from hits in place of you and allies while in its area. Enemies in the area are Chilled. You can only have one Frost Shield active at once.
explicitMods: 20% of Damage dealt to you or Allies in Area with Hits by Enemies in Area is taken from Frost Shield's Life before your Life or Energy Shield
60% of Damage dealt to you or Allies in Area with Hits by Enemies outside Area is taken from Frost Shield's Life before your Life or Energy Shield
You gain +0.38% to Spell Critical Strike Chance per Stage while in Area
Frost Shield has 910 maximum Life per Stage
Gains 1 Stage every 0.3 seconds while you are losing Energy Shield
You lose 730 Energy Shield per second
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

name: Kitava's Thirst
explicitMods:
50% chance to Trigger Socketed Spells when you Spend at least 100 Mana on an
Upfront Cost to Use or Trigger a Skill, with a 0.1 second Cooldown
flavourText: Tukohama, Tawhoa and Kitava went to the lake to fish.
Tawhoa weaved a net to catch the fish,
Tukohama built a fire to cook the fish,
and Kitava swallowed the entire lake, fish and all, with a single gulp.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Curses a single enemy, increasing the damage they take from projectiles, and making projectiles split when hitting them, to hit other targets around them. You can only have one Mark at a time.
explicitMods: Cursed enemies take 34% increased Damage from Projectile Hits
Projectiles which Hit Cursed Enemies Split towards 2 additional targets
